programme.title: Rabu Belajar Episode 90 Seni Berkomunikasi & Public Speaking
Ramadan The Series. âBu Juju (Julid & Judes)_ Into the Madnessâ
Pj. Gub Heru Pastikan Penataan Jaringan Utilitas Sesuai Standar Jakarta sebagai
Musrembang Tahun 2023 tingkat Kota_Kabupaten, di Kantor Wali Kota Jakarta Pusat
Nikmati Perjalanan LRT Rute Velodrome, Korsel Antusias Investasi Pembangunan LRT
Targetkan WTP, Pemprov DKI Jakarta Serahkan LKPD Tahun 2022 kepada BPK
HUT Satpol PP dan Satlinmas Solid, Tanggap, dan Humanis Layani Mayarakat

programme.title: Hati Penyembah (GMS) (01.30)
programme.desc: Tuhan tidak mencari penyembahan; Ia mencari penyembah-penyembah yang mau membangun hubungan dengan-Nya layaknya anak dan Bapanya. Jadilah penyembah-penyembah itu!

programme.title: IES ENCTR (02.00)
programme.desc: We are commited to serving the English speaking community of Jakarta, both expatriate and Indonesian, with a church that ministers to both the individual and the entire family.

programme.desc: Grace of Christ Community Churh, mengajak kita bersama bersyukur dan men-gingat kasih-Nya melalui Ibadah Online dengan nyanyian pujian dan membahas Firman Tuhan

programme.title: ABC News At Noon
programme.desc: The leading news at lunchtime. Ros Childs brings you the day's top stories and the latest news as it unfolds, with reporters in the community across Australia and around the world reporting on the issues that matter to you.

programme.title: A Girl's Guide To Hunting, Fishing
programme.desc: Conquering her fear of bees, Analiese gets her first beehive, before heading off on an adventure of foraging, fishing and diving with best friend and famous Thai restaurateur, Palisa Anderson in pristine Satellite Island.

programme.title: Gardening Australia
programme.desc: Costa Georgiadis goes behind the scenes at Ballarat's Begonia Festival, Jane Edmanson visits radio host Zan Rowe, Tino Carnevale shows how to test soil pH, and Millie Ross meets a gardener growing lots of exotic edibles.

programme.title: The Whiteley Art Scandal
programme.desc: In 2009 Steve Nasteski buys what he believes to be a genuine painting by Australian artist Brett Whiteley. But when suspicions are raised about its authenticity, a chain of events leads to a sensational trial in Melbourne.

programme.title: Media Watch
programme.desc: Australia's leading forum for media analysis and comment, bringing you a brave and fearless critique of the week's journalism, issues and events in the news. Presented by Paul Barry.

programme.title: Four Corners
programme.desc: Four Corners is the home of Australian investigative journalism. These fearless and forensic documentaries expose scandals, trigger inquiries, fire debate and confront taboos.

programme.title: Afternoon Briefing
programme.desc: Live from Parliament House in Canberra, Greg Jennett brings you everything you need to know about politics, national and global affairs today, speaking with the key decision makers and stakeholders on issues in the news.

programme.title: ABC News with Joe O'Brien
programme.desc: Lorna Dunkley brings you a comprehensive summary of the day's events, with the latest breaking news, in depth coverage of the top stories, live crosses, interviews and explainers to bring you up to speed on what's going on.

programme.title: Beyond Awesome
programme.desc: We visit Sri Lanka and Indonesia to meet scientists saving some of our amazing animals, go behind the scenes with a plastic pollution warrior, and hit the stage with a fearless woman using humour to make a positive impact.

programme.title: That Pacific Sports Show
programme.desc: Join Tiana Penitani and Sam Wykes for your weekly hit of Pacific joy, as they share inspiring stories and incredible sporting prowess of athletes with Pacific Island heritage, from Australia and around the world.

programme.title: ABC National News
programme.desc: Wherever you are and whenever you need us, ABC News is here to bring you round the clock coverage of the latest news and the day's stories. Plus reporters investigating issues that matter to you. Presented by Joe O'Brien.

Sarah Ferguson presents Australia's premier daily current affairs program, delivering agenda-setting public affairs journalism and interviews that hold the powerful to account. Plus political analysis from Laura Tingle.

programme.title: ABC News Tonight
programme.desc: More news, more often - the home of breaking news and in-depth coverage of the issues that matter. The ABC's network of reporters cover important stories and bring you news and information you need. Presented by Yvonne Yong.

programme.title: The Business
programme.desc: Australia's leading daily business and finance show, bringing you up to date on market moves, economic trends and the forces affecting consumers, employees and business owners big and small. Presented by Kirsten Aiken.

programme.title: The World
programme.desc: There's never been a more important time to stay in touch with what's happening in our world. Now at the new earlier time of 9pm AEST, Beverley O'Connor presents the latest international news from correspondents and guests.

programme.title: Australian Story
programme.desc: He can't cook, he's not after money but Shaun Christie-David is building a restaurant empire that's changing lives one dish at a time.

programme.title: Planet America
programme.desc: The 2024 Presidential race is on. Former President Donald Trump is the last person standing in the Republican field, seeking his third nomination. Current President Joe Biden runs for re-election as both seek a second term.

programme.title: Palisa Anderson's Water Heart Food
programme.desc: Palisa Anderson explores the native ingredients around Byron Bay, collecting pipis with local Indigenous woman Arabella and tasting a fish dish with emu egg Thermidor sauce, cooked by chef Josh Lewis of Fleet Restaurant.

programme.title: A Girl's Guide To Hunting, Fishing
programme.desc: Analiese heads to Bruny Island for her first wallaby hunt with friend and wallaby-hunter, Richard. She returns home to deal with the wild rabbits that are decimating her the garden, resulting in a delicious rabbit stew.

programme.title: ABC Late News
programme.desc: Follow the story with the latest on today's news, explaining what's happening and why it matters. ABC News has reporters across Australia and around the globe covering what you need to know. Presented by Jade Barker in Perth.

As Jen falls for Hui, he invites her out on a date as a research for her script and they start acting out of love.

programme.title: Wolf Pack
programme.desc: The Wolf Pack squad led by Lao Diao, is a foreign-based team that specializes in overseas security jobs. In one of the missions, the squad discovers that a terrorist force is planning to destroy the countryâs energy source. Lao Diao is now entrusted with the task of leading his squad to fight back. Can the Wolf Pack save the day?

programme.title: Sound of Colors
programme.desc: Lonesome marriage consultant Ming meets a blind but charming young lady, Yeuk, at a subway station. When Ming suddenly turns blind too, Yeuk helps him navigate through his world of darkness, and they begin to fall in love. This feature is based on the illustrated book from famous Taiwan illustrator Jimmy Liao.

programme.title: My Kung Fu Sweetheart
programme.desc: Phoenixâs (Cecilia Cheung) parents are martial arts superheroes, who hide their true identities while ferreting out evil martial artists. Phoenix gets the go-ahead to train in the misty mountains, where she learns of her all-important romantic destiny...

programme.title: My Indian Boyfriend
programme.desc: This is a love story between a Hong Kong girl and an Indian boy and is the first Bollywood movie to be made in Hong Kong. It encapsulates the conflicts caused by discrimination as well as differences in social-cultural background, lifestyle and family values between the races. The movie also combines tears, joy and laughter with song and dance.

programme.title: Where The Wind Blows
programme.desc: Founded in the 70s, Hong Kongâs ICAC is committed to fight corruption in the police force. Detectives Lui Lok and Nam Kong build a corruption system that creates conflicts between the triad and the police. When ICAC hunts down the two, their control finally comes to an end. Where the wind blows, Hong Kong is no longer what it used to be!

programme.title: Detective Vs. Sleuths
programme.desc: Hong Kong is rocked by a series of cold-blooded murders whose victims are runaway suspects of unsolved cases. The group of killers calls themselves âThe Chosen Sleuths". Former top detective Lee vows to bring the brutal killers to justice and prove himself to be the real âChosen Sleuthâ instead of a lunatic.

programme.title: Miao Miao
programme.desc: Miao Miao is an awkward young beauty who nevertheless enchants her outgoing classmate Xiao Ai. As Xiao Aiâs feelings for Miao Miao grows from friendship to something more, Miao Miao discovers her own burgeoning attraction to a sullen CD store owner, and quietly pursues him.

programme.title: Dummy Mommy, without a Baby
programme.desc: Fong Lai Kuen works at an advertising agency but is about to be sacked by her boss after offending him. She pretends to be pregnant so that the company cannot fire her, according to the labour law. Since then, Fong receives much care and love from her colleagues and begins to feel guilty about her lie as things develop out of her expectations.

programme.title: My School Mate, The Barbarian
programme.desc: Edward attends a new school which has a reputation for fighting. Student leader Stone, befriends Edward, but their friendship is tested when a local triad leader discovers that Edward comes from a wealthy family.

programme.title: My Prince Edward
programme.desc: A newly engaged Hong Kong woman tries to rid herself of a secret sham marriage to a mainlander that she was paid for years ago, before she can get married for real. Winner of Best Original Film Score and Best New Director at the 39th Hong Kong Film Awards.

programme.title: Everything is Unknown
programme.desc: Pan Yi Ming receives his father's will stating that he must attend his funeral at home to claim the huge inheritance. When he returns home, he encounters his ex-girlfriend, her husband Hua Qi and his daughter whom he has never met. When Pan discovers that his daughter is being abused by Hua, he vows to save her but eventually fall into their trapâ¦

programme.title: Men Suddenly in Love
programme.desc: Five high-school alumni - councilor Ng Yuk Yan (Eric Tsang), actor Cheung Chau Wan (Jim Chim), gynecologist Fu Mo Sum (Wong Jing), feng shui master Szeto Kei Fung (Chapman To), and dance coach Charlie Lam (Det Dik) - get together to throw a birthday party for their respected teacher Mr. Chu (Richard Ng), who enlightened them about the birds and the bees. Five delectable young models appear at the party, during which the 80-year-old educator gets too excited and unfortunately kicks the bucket - but not before telling his pupils to fulfill his last wish and get a little naughty! The quintet of married men then takes it upon themselves to conquer the babes, all the while trying to evade the watchful eye of their wives (Maggie Cheung Ho Yee, Yeung Sze Man, Monica Chan, Mak Ling Ling, and Jacqueline Chong).

programme.title: Wo Hu
programme.desc: The Hong Kong Police has placed more than a thousand undercover officers in various triad groups to bring down the largest criminal organization in Hong Kong. Betrayal, deceit and murder bring this group of "brothers" into a collision with the law and with each other!

programme.title: Life Must Go On
programme.desc: When the âmidnight gymnasiumâ programme for wayward teenage girls is at funding risk, social worker Yanki puts together a dodgeball team to compete in a match and save it. With an ex-star athlete John as the coach, the girls realize they must face their problems and overcome their challenges instead of dodging them. Can they finally win the match?

programme.title: Europe Raiders
programme.desc: Mr Lin and Miss Wang are the two top bounty hunters in the business, and are searching for the destructive missile âHand of Godâ to prove who is the better bounty hunter. They soon realize they are not the only ones after the missile. Will Lin and Wang put their differences aside and work together in search for the âHand of Godâ?

programme.title: Knockout
programme.desc: A former boxing champion and convict who has just been released from prison discovers that his wife has died and he is now a single parent. The situation is made worse with his daughterâs diagnosis of leukaemia. In order to encourage his daughter and fulfil his promise of never giving up, he re-enters the boxing ring.

programme.title: Only Cloud Knows
programme.desc: This romantic drama is based on the story of a real-life couple. It follows a grieving husband as he journeys to places of significance to his beloved dead wife across their New Zealand homeland.

programme.title: The Silent War
programme.desc: After the Chinese Civil War, 701 Bureau continues to monitor the coded transmissions between rebel forces. When radio frequencies used by the opponent disappear suddenly, Agent Zhang asks Ho, a blind piano tuner with exceptional hearing, to help find the transmission signals. Can Ho find the missing signals and foil a possible assassination plot?

programme.title: Those Were the Days
programme.desc: Director Wong despises Cantonese movies of the 60s, but accidentally travels back in time to that movie set. He meets Director Chu, who tells him he can return to modern time if someone likes the film he makes. Wong meets four classic movie stars and invites them to star in his new film, but it flops unexpectedly. Can Wong return to the present?

programme.title: Kill Mobile
programme.desc: Seven friends get together and decide to play a game where they must share all the messages, calls and app notifications on each other's cell phones. Hilarity and drama follows as everyone's secrets are unveiled throughout the evening, and the seven friends find themselves more like strangers to each other than ever before!

programme.title: Binding Souls
programme.desc: Five old friends revisit their school before it closes down to find records of paranormal existence, including the mysterious case of a missing student. The school was previously occupied by the Japanese for various âhuman experimentsâ and is known to be haunted. Can the five friends get out of the school safely?

programme.title: Death Stranding
programme.desc: To overhaul the underground gambling industry, the police join hands with the gambling association to crack down on illegal casinos. They auction off new casino licenses to regulate the industry, but this results in an upheaval in the gambling world, unveiling the hidden interests and secrets while sparking conflicts between gangs...

programme.title: Distinction
programme.desc: A music teacher in a special needs school, an underachiever from an elite school, and a rebellious teenager with a handicapped brother take part in a campus musical for various reasons. Little did they know that this turns out to be a journey of self-discovery.

programme.title: Adventure of the King
programme.desc: The Ming Emperor Zhengde flees the palace to see the world after his mother orders him to marry an ugly princess. He disguises as a commoner and escapes with his advisors, but a gambling mishap causes them to part ways and Zhengde lost all his money. Phoenix, the owner of Lung Fung Inn, takes him in out of pity, and thus begins his new adventure...

programme.title: Home Sweet Home
programme.desc: A school bus accident kills almost everyone on board. The bus driver got injured and partially lost his memory while rescuing one of the boys. To thank the driver, the boyâs dad, Wang, brings him to live with the family in their basement. However, the driver soon discovers strange behaviours from the Wangâs which seem to be related to the accident.

programme.title: New Kung Fu Cult Master 1
programme.desc: Wu Dang Sectâs Zhang Chui Shanâs son, Zhang Wu Ji, finds himself accidentally embroiled in the fight for the Dragon Sabre. When he unwittingly learns the powerful martial arts skills from the Jiuyin scriptures, Wu Ji proceeds to help the Six Major sects fight against the corrupt government.

programme.title: Acting Out of Love
programme.desc: Wei Hung Jen is a struggling actor who gets fired but finds a job behind the scene. Hui Hsin, the associate producer, must write a script for a love story so as to get a reference letter to study scriptwriting overseas. As Jen falls for Hui, he invites her out on a date as a research for her script and they start acting out of love.

programme.title: Wolf Pack
programme.desc: The Wolf Pack squad led by Lao Diao, is a foreign-based team that specializes in overseas security jobs. DAAI Inspirasi
programme.desc: DAAI Inspirasi menghadirkan kisah kegiatan para relawan dalam menyebarkan nilai nilai kemanusiaan dan kebaikan di tengah masyarakat. Program ini mengajak pemirsa agar dapat memandang segala hal dengan empati dan cinta kasih.

programme.title: Lentera Kehidupan
programme.desc: Program motivasi yang memberikan solusi dan inspirasi bagi kehidupan kita dilihat dari sisi yang lebih mendalam

programme.title: Master Cheng Yen Bercerita
programme.desc: Teladan cerita yang dikemas dalam animasi yang menarik dan mengharukan. Cocok menjadi tuntunan moral dan budi pekerti sehari-hari untuk segala usia. Menghadirkan beragam kisah legenda dari berbagai bangsa yang membangun karakter personal, komunitas dan bangsa.

programme.title: Kartun Petualangan Xiao Li Zi

programme.title: Bumiku Satu
programme.desc: Diantara kepungan moderintas saat ini, Program Bumiku Satu justru membawa kita kembali ke alam. programme.desc: Program penyembahan yang menenggelamkan kita dalam hadirat Tuhan, dibawakan oleh GMS Live yang lahir dari kegerakan nyata yang didorong oleh nafas pujian dan penyembahan yang mengiramakan 'warna' khas kebangunan rohani yang sedang terjadi di GMS.

programme.title: Teaching Series With Philip Mantofa Eps 158 Kitab Ester, Favorit Raja Pasal 8
programme.desc: Sebuah program 1 jam yang akan mengubahkan hidup pemirsanya. Memuat pesan-pesan firman Tuhan yang dibagikan langsung oleh hamba-Nya Ps. Philip Mantofa yang membangun dan menguatkan iman.

programme.title: Firman & Doa Eps 124 Rahasia Ucapan Syukur
programme.desc: Bukan sekedar program, melainkan alat bagi Allah bekerja untuk mengenyangkan roh dan jiwa setiap orang yang memerlukan kesembuhan, mujizat, kekuatan, dan jamahan-Nya.

programme.title: Moment of Worship 2 Eps 219
programme.desc: Program penyembahan yang menenggelamkan kita dalam hadirat Tuhan, dibawakan oleh GMS Live yang lahir dari kegerakan nyata yang didorong oleh nafas pujian dan penyembahan yang mengiramakan 'warna' khas kebangunan rohani yang sedang terjadi di GMS.

programme.title: Marketplace Wisdom Eps 63 Karir Terangkat Tanpa Menjilat
programme.desc: Tidak ada jarak dalam hadirat Tuhan, dan tayangan Before 30 adalah salah satu buktinya, di mana pesan firman dan kesaksian mengenai mujizat kesembuhan dari Tuhan dapat mengubah hidup mereka yang menyaksikannya sebelum 30 menit berakhir.

programme.title: The Message (Sumatera) Eps 179 Sumur Rahel - Wewejangan Manis Bagi yang Merintis
programme.desc: Tayangan khotbah ibadah hari Minggu yang memuat pesan-pesan firman Tuhan oleh para gembala GMS dari seluruh Indonesia.

Hingga dilema mereka memuncak saat Diana dijodohkan oleh Oka pria pilihan ibunya.

programme.title: Jatuh Cinta Lagi
programme.desc: Lila adalah pengacara idealis yang suka membela perempuan teraniaya dan Andre adalah pengacara dengan kasus-kasus "kelas kakap". Keduanya bertemu dalam kasus perceraian seorang penyanyi dangdut

programme.title: Baby Blues
programme.desc: Sepasang suami-istri, Andika dan Dinda tidak menyangka bahwa merawat bayi tidak semudah yang dibayangkan. Hal ini membuat Dinda mengalami sindrom baby blues yang kemudian memicu perdebatan dan pertengkaran.

programme.title: Berangkat
programme.desc: Kisah tiga sekawan, yakni, Jano, Joana, dan Dika yang masing-masing memiliki personality dan hobi yang berbeda. Mereka melakukan road trip ke Kawah Ijen dan dilanjutkan ke Bali. Bermodalkan VW Combi tua mereka menyusuri beberapa kota di Jawa dengan banyak cerita.

programme.title: Video Maut
programme.desc: Menceritakan tentang Doni yang memiliki keinginan untuk membuat video mesum dengan kekasihnya Maya di sebuah villa. Maya merupakan gadis lugu yang dikerjai oleh Doni. Di villa itu maya tidak sendiri namun mengajak temanya dan membuat rencana Doni berantakan, akhirnya ia membuat rencana agar teman-teman maya pergi dan melancarkan aksinya. Saat Doni merayu Maya dan memulai membuat video munculah sosok menyeramkan. Doni dan maya akhirnya gila. Video itu tersebar di dunia maya, dan barang siapa yang menontonya akan mati dibunuh oleh sosok menyeramkan di video itu.

programme.title: Tumbal 97
programme.desc: Kematian istri Saeful Jamil, artis ternama, turut menarik perhatian Prista, wartawan majalah Misteri, yang ditugaskan mengungkap kecelakaan tsb. Pada saat mengambil gambar di tempat kejadian kecelakaan, Prista tersentak kaget ketika ia melihat ada yang janggal pada hasil fotonya Ada sesosok bayangan nenek tua berambut pirang

programme.title: Roy Kiyoshi (The Untold Story)
programme.desc: Roy, yang punya kemampuan berinteraksi dengan makhluk gaib sangat frustrasi ketika Rani adiknya diculik setan. Roy merasa gagal melindungi adiknya. Tiga tahun kemudian, Sheila, pekerja LSM yang peduli dalam penanggulangan anak hilang diteror setan ketika sedang menangani kasus anak hilang secara misterius. Sheila sangat yakin bahwa kemunculan setan ini ada hubungannya dengan kasus yang sedang ditanganinya.

programme.title: Punk In Love
programme.desc: Diawali oleh percobaan bunuh diri yang menghebohkan kota Malang, empat anak Punk, Arok, Yoji, Mojo, dan Almira tanpa pikir panjang memutuskan untuk pergi ke Jakarta untuk menyatakan cinta pada seorang cewek pujaan

programme.title: Ratu Kostmopolitan
programme.desc: Tiga cewek cantik dan bokek mau tidak mau harus jumpalitan, putar otak, dan baca mantra buat mengusir preman yang mau menggusur rumah kost mereka. Sambil rebutan cowok, pula!

programme.title: Pulau Hantu 2
programme.desc: Merupakan kelanjutan dari "Pulau Hantu" yang pertama. Dante, kembali harus terperangkap di pulau hantu dan harus menyelamatkan diri dari sesosok arwah penasaran yang mengejarnya dan juga temannya. Keadaan tambah kacau ketika pulau tersebut didatangi anak-anak muda yang ingin membuat pesta, dan diperparah dengan tewasnya sang dukun yang bertugas mengamankan suasana.

programme.title: Menggapai Matahari
programme.desc: Mobil yang dikendarai Tika, kekasih Rhoma Irama, menabrak Selvy hingga tewas. Rhoma Irama mengaku sebagai pengendara mobil tersebut untuk meyelamatkan kekasihnya dari penjara. Indra, kekasih Selvy, berusaha merebut Tika dari Rhoma Irama, sedangkan Beny Compo, kakak Selvy, berusaha menghancurkan karir musik Rhoma Irama sebagai pelampiasan dendam

programme.title: Pulau Hantu 2
programme.desc: Merupakan kelanjutan dari "Pulau Hantu" yang pertama. Dante, kembali harus terperangkap di pulau hantu dan harus menyelamatkan diri dari sesosok arwah penasaran yang mengejarnya dan juga temannya. Keadaan tambah kacau ketika pulau tersebut didatangi anak-anak muda yang ingin membuat pesta, dan diperparah dengan tewasnya sang dukun yang bertugas mengamankan suasana.

Menceritakan tentang rumah yang baru ditempati oleh Kevin dan Nayla. Mereka bertetangga oleh Julian, Dita dan anaknya Lila. Namun ternyata rumah mereka berpenghuni mahluk halus yang selalu meneror keluarga-nya. Kejadian fatal yang membuat Nayla membunuh Kevin adalah ketika Nayla diperkosa oleh mahluk halus yang menyerupai Kevin hingga Nayla hamil.

programme.title: Arie Hanggara
programme.desc: Kisah nyata setelah warga Jakarta dihebohkan kasus meninggalnya seorang bocah 8 tahun bernama Arie Hanggara akibat penyiksaan orang tuanya.

programme.title: Antri Dong
programme.desc: Dendy, pemuda mata keranjang yang berhubungan dengan tiga wanita, Linda, Cindy dan Sally. Masalah datang saat mereka bertiga datang di hari ulang tahunnya.

programme.title: Kirun+Adul Pengen Punya Pacar Keren
programme.desc: Anak perempuan Wakil Presiden diculik. Kirun dan Adul disinyalir jadi penjahatnya.

programme.title: Mati Muda Di Pelukan Janda
programme.desc: Rahmat yang sejak kecil sudah ditinggal mati oleh kedua orang tuanya, tumbuh besar diasuh oleh seorang pemilik salon, mbak Bunga atau mas Bambang. Tempat tinggalnya berhadapan langsung dengan rumah yang ditempati oleh seorang janda, Ratih, yang sudah menjada selama 2 tahun. Rahmat pun menaruh hati pada Ratih. Namun ada janda lain yang menyukai Rahmat dan membenci Ratih, Mpok Sari, yang selalu membuat onar agar para warga memusuhi Ratih.

programme.title: Obama Anak Menteng
programme.desc: Barry Obama berusia 9 tahun ketika tiba di Menteng. Sebagai anak baru dengan latar belakang campur aduk membuatnya sulit beradaptasi. Persahabatannya dengan anak-anak tetangga, berbeda strata sosialÂ yaitu Slamet dan Yuniardi, serta pembantunya yang banci, Turdi, membawa Barry ke berbagai pengalaman

programme.title: Hijab
programme.desc: Menceritakan tentang keempat sahabat Anin, Bia,Tata dan Sari. Mereka mempunyai gaya berpenampilan berbeda-beda kecuali Anin yang tidak memakai Hijab. Kegalauan mereka semakin meningkat karena mereka berhijab dan mendapatkan uang dari "Ikut Suami". Namun hal itu dibantah dengan mereka membangun bisnis Hijab dan berhasil. Dengan penghasilan mereka yang melebihi para suaminya, keharmonisan rumah tangga merekapun mulai diuji.

programme.title: Jones: Jomblo Ngenes
programme.desc: Noval jatuh cinta saat bertemu Astika. Tapi di antara suka dan bahagia, ada pula rasa sakit. Noval berkali-kali terjerumus di situasi di mana Astika memperdayainya. Astika meminta Noval berbuat dan berkata aneh-aneh di berbagai situasi menggelikan. Noval bisa saja menjauh, tapi pesona Atika membuatnya tak bisa meninggalkannya.

programme.title: Cintaku Di Rumah Susun
programme.desc: Sebuah sketsa karikatural tetang kehidupan di rumah susun sederhana yang kehidupan penghuninya beraneka ragam. Dalam lingkungan ini terjadi persahabatan dan pertikaian antar penghuni yang penuh rahasia dan intrik

programme.title: Warkop Pintar-Pintar Bodoh
programme.desc: Dono, Kasino, Indro dan Dorman jadi detektif swasta.Â Mereka kemudian terpecah menjadi dua kubu yang saling bersaing gara-gara ribut soal duit.

programme.title: Cewek Gokil
programme.desc: Keke bukan sembarang anak perempuan, kepalanya penuh dengan cita-cita dan keinginan. Impian Keke yang semakin dekat, tapi suatu kejadian memaksa Keke untuk merelakan mimpi yang sudah diraihnya itu

programme.title: Hotline 666
programme.desc: Menceritakan tentang Erza yang terperangkap di sebuah rumah angker. Erza merupakan pengantar pizza, saat dia mengantaran pizza ke sebuah rumah an ternyata dihuni oleh Sandra, Miko, dan Dara. Sosok yang awalnya hanyalah rekaan Erza menjadi nyata. Pintu rumah itu tertutup secara gaib. Erza terkunci di dalamnya.

programme.title: Suami-Suami Takut Istri
programme.desc: Demi mengabulkan permintaan para istri yang meminta berbulan madu ke Bali, para suami pun mengajak para istri ke Bali. Walaupun sebenarnya ada maksud lain dibalik kebaikan para suami. Mereka berencana untuk menghadiri pertunjukan super sexy dari Trio Ganas. Namun akhirnya para istri mengetahui adanya rencana lain dari para suami.

programme.title: Pengantin Pantai Biru
programme.desc: Bercerita tentang sekumpulan orang yang berlibur ke sebuah pantai yang indah namun dipercaya kental dengan unsur mistis. Peringatan terhadap kehadiran mahluk gaib sedari awal sudah diperingatkan, namun mereka tidak menggubrisnya, sampai satu per satu dari mereka menghilang.

programme.desc: Master explorer Dirk Pitt goes on the adventure of a lifetime of seeking out a lost Civil War battleship known as the "Ship of Death" in the deserts of West Africa while helping a WHO doctor being hounded by a ruthless dictator.

programme.desc: The plot revolves around four female fighters who begin as rivals, but subsequently find themselves teaming up against another force.

programme.desc: An American backpacker gets involved with a ring of drug smugglers as their driver, though he winds up on the run from his employers across Munich's high-speed Autobahn.

programme.title: Freddy
programme.desc: The lines between love and obsession blur in this romantic thriller packed with unpredictable twists and sharp turns.

programme.title: Liger Saala Crossbreed
programme.desc: A talented young MMA fighter trains hard to rise up the ranks. However, his goals are hindered when his lover is kidnapped. Release Year: 2022 Director: Puri Jagannadh

programme.title: Darr
programme.desc: Rahul is obsessed with Kiran and stalks her constantly. However, Rahul goes berserk when she gets engaged to Sunil, a navy officer, and he decides to forcefully claim Kiran for himself. Release Year: 1993 Director: Yash Chopra Awards: Filmfare Awards- Best Comedian/Comedienne Anupam Kher , Silver Lotus Award- Best Popular Film Providing Wholesome Entertainment Yash Chopra

programme.title: Hum Hai Rahi Pyar Ke
programme.desc: Rahul looks after his spoilt nephews, Sunny and Vicky, and niece, Munni. When they go to a funfair, they meet Vyjayanti, who has run away from home, and decide to shelter her without Rahul's consent. Release Year: 1993 Director: Mahesh Bhatt

programme.title: Lootcase
programme.desc: Nandan Kumar comes across a suitcase and discovers it is full of cash. He takes the suitcase and soon finds himself being chased by a notorious gangster, an honest cop and a minister. Release Year: 2020 Director: Rajesh Krishnan Awards: 2021 Nominee Film Award - Best Film

programme.title: Andaz - 1971
programme.desc: Widowed school teacher Sheetal, living with her son, meets Ravi, a widower and father of her student. They decide to marry.

programme.title: Mehndi (1998)
programme.desc: A newly-wed woman named Pooja decides to retaliate against her ill-treating in-laws and husband, unable to tolerate their mistreatment any longer.

programme.title: Selfiee
programme.desc: Superstar Vijay's license request sparks feud with fanatical RTO officer Om. Release Year: 2023 Director: Raj Mehta

programme.title: Cuttputlli
programme.desc: An inspector and a police officer are on a mission to track down a child abduction racket. Release Year: 2022 Director: Ranjit M. Tewari Awards: 2022 Winner Critics Choice Award - Best Content - Thriller

programme.title: Tango Charlie
programme.desc: When war breaks out between India and Pakistan a group is sent to Kargil to guard a bridge. This is where Tarun becomes a true soldier. Release Year: 2005 Director: Mani Shankar

programme.title: Aiyaary (2018)
programme.desc: After Colonel Abhay Singh and his protege Jai Bakshi have a fallout, Jai goes rogue and threatens to bring down the government. So the mentor is forced to go after him.

programme.title: Gharwali Baharwali
programme.desc: Arun marries Kaajal because his dad wants grandchildren. She fails to conceive. Chaos descends as she finds that Arun is having an affair. Release Year: 1998 Director: David Dhawan

programme.title: Pati Patni Aur Wooh - 1978
programme.desc: The happily married life of Sharda and Ranjeet is marred by dark clouds when he engages in an illicit affair with his secretary, Nirmala.

programme.title: Silsila - 1981
programme.desc: A man is obliged to leave his lover and marry his brother's fiancee after he dies in a plane crash. But life takes a turn when he meets his lover.

programme.title: Rajaji
programme.desc: Raja marries Payal, a multimillionaire's daughter, in a bid to lead a stress-free life. When he learns that she is actually the daughter of the multimillionaire's gardener, he abandons her. Release Year: 1999 Director: Vimal Kumar

programme.title: Dulhan Hum Le Jayenge
programme.desc: Sapna and Raja meet while touring Europe and fall in love. Raja sets out to impress all three of her uncles and marry her with their consent. Release Year: 2000 Director: David Dhawan

programme.title: Jhanak
programme.desc: A driven young woman embarks on a journey to fulfil a mother's promise for a better life as she overcomes challenges and loss while crossing paths with a man who further complicates her life.

programme.title: Maati Se Bandhi Dor
programme.desc: Hard-working Vaiju labours in the fields to support her family and village, but she finds her life facing an unexpected challenge when Rannvijay dismisses her as a potential wife.

programme.title: Yeh Hai Chahatein
programme.desc: Preesha's life revolves around her son Saaransh, while Rudraksh is an insensitive rockstar. When an unfortunate event brings these two strangers at a crossroad, there might be a new beginning for them.

programme.title: Udne Ki Aasha
programme.desc: A dreamy-eyed Sayali yearns for her prince charming. But when destiny ties her with hero-cum-thug Sachin, will her hopes for a fairytale life prevail?

programme.title: Ghum Hai Kisikey Pyaar Meiin
programme.desc: Virat, a young police officer, marries a woman to honour the promise he made to her dying father. But when his former lover re-enters his life, he finds his heart pulled in both directions.

programme.title: Teri Meri Doriyaann
programme.desc: Two young individuals, Angad and Sahiba, can barely stand one another. However, their lives end up intertwining because of a marriage.

programme.title: Meetha Khatta Pyaar Hamara
programme.desc: Often labelled as 'Miss Average', Sajeeri finds herself falling for the perfectionist Shivam, but true love seems elusive when it becomes clear that her feelings are one-sided.

programme.title: Anupamaa
programme.desc: Anupamaa, who parts with her ambitions and goals in a bid to raise her family, feels dejected when she fails to get any credit for her sacrifices and trials. She then decides to live on her own terms.

Virtues of Harmony
programme.desc: Yau Nim Chi is the matriarch of the new rich Kam House and a single mother of the 24-year-old Kam triplets. The Kam family owns a restaurant in town, famous for its noodles, which are notoriously cooked by Nim Chi's arrogant younger brother, Yau Nim Fu.

programme.title: Lo And Behold
programme.desc: HUNG SHU-KAN (Lau Dan) built his own logistics business from scratch and now everything is in order. The only thing on his mind is the well-being of his three daughters. His eldest daughter has moved abroad, but his second youngest daughter, HUNG YUEK-SHUI (Koni Lui), is still single.

programme.desc: Subhash Patel, a retired army officer, takes on a group of drug traffickers. ACP Catherine, a corrupt lady officer, vows to find out the reason behind his mission.

programme.title: Billa - The Don
programme.desc: A cop chases international gangster Billa and happens to be the only one to see him die. He places Velu, Billa's lookalike, inside the gang to get information. But Velu is framed for killing the cop.

programme.title: Daring Policewala
programme.desc: A young cop needs to show his true potential to catch a gangster and to win his love.

programme.title: Main Faisla Karunga
programme.desc: Twin brothers, Vasu and Vel, get separated at birth and grow up in different families. One becomes an officer while the other turns into a rough character.

programme.title: Insan
programme.desc: Amjad's (Akshay Kumar) joy knows no bounds when his estranged brother Munna (Rahul Dev) returns home, little realising that Munna has plans of a big terrorist attack. A 2005 film.

programme.title: Masss
programme.desc: After a life-threatening accident, a man finds that he can communicate with the dead, and must decide whether to act on their advice. Stars: Suriya, Nayanthara. 2015

programme.title: Kuruvi -Urdu
programme.desc: Vetrivel, a car racer, learns that a Malaysia-based don owes his father a huge sum of money. However, when he meets the don, he realises that his missing father may still be alive and held captive.

programme.title: Suriya S3
programme.desc: Durai Singham, an honest and uncompromising DCP, takes on a businessman and his goons who are involved in illegal dumping of toxic waste and causing serious health concerns.

programme.title: Commando 2
programme.desc: A four-member team goes on a covert mission to bring back a money launderer from Malaysia. However, things complicate after one of the members goes missing.Vidyut jammwal(2017)

programme.title: Shaadi Mein Zaroor Aana
programme.desc: Aarti loves Sattu but she chooses career over their marriage. Years later, when their paths cross again, Sattu avenges his humiliation. 2017

programme.title: Housefull
programme.desc: Housefull is a romantic comedy entertainer which narrates the story of Aarush - the world's unluckiest man. Being jinxed, he believes his bad luck can vanish if he finds true love. In this quest for true love how one lie leads to another and how different people from different walks of life come together adding even more confusion to this hilarious comedy of errors resulting in total chaos and mayhem forms the crux of the story. The line which Deepika tells Akshay in the film "Jis jhooth se kissi ka ghar basta ho, voh jhooth jhooth nahin hota", pretty much sums up the essence of the film.

programme.title: Tere Bina Jiya Jaye Na - Rerun
programme.desc: When an ordinary girl and a prince fall in love, they must overcome a series of challenges that threaten to ruin their relationship.

programme.title: Kundali Bhagya Rerun
programme.desc: The story of Preeta and Shristhi, sisters who live with their father. Before dying their father reveals the truth that their mother is alive and living in Mumbai. Preeta and Shristhi's mother is Sarla Arora and they both are long lost sisters of Pragya (Kumkum Bhagya).

programme.title: Badho Bahu Rerun
programme.desc: Badho Bahu tells the story of an overweight girl, Komal, who gets the nickname Badho because of her physical appearance. Komal is made to perform heavy manual tasks that require physical strength. She is sweet, loving, energetic and simple girl. He has a big heart and helps most people in his town. Lucky Singh Ahlawat is a famous wrestler and is known for his looks. A series of events causes Komal and Lucky to get married.

programme.title: Shaadi Mein Zaroor Aana
programme.desc: Aarti loves Sattu but she chooses career over their marriage. Years later, when their paths cross again, Sattu avenges his humiliation. 2017

programme.title: Taish
programme.desc: Rohan and Sunny, his best friend, prepare for the festivities for his younger brother's wedding. However, a chance meeting between Rohan and Kuljinder, a crime lord, sparks violence during the event.

programme.title: Raanjhnaa
programme.desc: Kundan, the son of a Hindu pundit, discovers that his childhood sweetheart Zoya loves city-bred Akram and wants to marry him. However, he persistently seeks to win her heart.

programme.title: Badho Bahu

programme.title: Hamara Dil Aapke Paas Hai
programme.desc: Naive yet bold and daring, Preeti Virat, comes forward as a witness to heinous assault carried by Bhavani Choudhry and his men on a person who owes them money. Bhavani is arrested and held for trial. This angers the Choudhry family. The victim is threatened with dire consequences, and he withdraws the complaint, and as a result Bhavani is released and all charges are dropped. Preeti is then raped by one of the Choudhry men, and subsequently her very own family disowns her. She finds shelter with another do-gooder, Avinash, who even takes her to his apartment. But the story does not end here, for the neighborhood is soon in an uproar over her, and want her to leave. The only solution is that Preeti marry Avinash, she agrees to do so, and then finds out that there is two children who called Avinash "daddy", and she does not know if there is another woman or even a wife involved. And then the police arrest Preeti under the charge of prostitution, on a complaint filed by none other than Avinash's dad.

programme.title: Saand Ki Aankh
programme.desc: Chandro and Prakashi, who live in a patriarchal society and are in their 60s, accidentally discover their shooting skills. With the help of an instructor, they participate in various competitions.

programme.title: Thappad
programme.desc: A story of Amrita whose seemingly perfect life is shattered when her husband slaps her once in a party. But is one slap enough to question what a relationship stands for?

programme.title: Shubh Mangal Saavdhan
programme.desc: Mudit, manages to woo Sugandha & two decide to get married. However, before the wedding, their relationship undergoes a setback as they discover his erectile dysfunction.

programme.title: Nazar
programme.desc: Divya, a singer, is haunted by bizarre visions of unnerving murders after she encounters an accident. Inspector Rohan, who believes her, sets out to nab the serial killer with her help.

programme.title: 23rd March 1931 - Shaheed
programme.desc: The saga of Bhagat Singh who sets to avenge the death of his mentor Lala Lajpatrai, and thus gets hanged to death! A 2007 film that glorifies the martyr!

programme.title: Guru
programme.desc: A simple but ambitious villager, along with his wife, arrives in Bombay in early 1958 and rises from its streets to become the biggest tycoon in Indian history.

programme.title: Jail
programme.desc: Parag all going for himself; promotion & a girlfriend. His life turns upside down when he's falsely implicated & imprisoned. But, he's determined to put an end to his nightmare.

programme.title: Sabse Bada Khiladi
programme.desc: A police officer impersonates his murdered twin brother in order to bring his killers to justice.
